properties.displayName: Rundll32 Proxy Execution for Defense Evasion
properties.description: Detects rundll32.exe being used to proxy execution of malicious code
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\rundll32.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "javascript:" or CommandLine|contains has "vbscript:" or CommandLine|contains has "mshtml" or CommandLine|contains has "shell32.dll,ShellExec_RunDLL" or CommandLine|contains has "advpack.dll" or CommandLine|contains has "ieframe.dll" or CommandLine|contains has "shdocvw.dll" or CommandLine|contains has "urlmon.dll" or CommandLine|contains has "ieadvpack.dll" or CommandLine|contains has "setupapi.dll" or CommandLine|contains has "ieframe.dll") and (CommandLine|contains has "DllCanUnloadNow" or CommandLine|contains has "DllGetVersion" or CommandLine|contains has "DllInstall" or CommandLine|contains has "DllRegisterServer" or CommandLine|contains has "DllUnregisterServer" or CommandLine|contains has "OpenURL" or CommandLine|contains has "RouteTheCall" or CommandLine|contains has "LaunchApplication") and (CommandLine|contains has "http://" or CommandLine|contains has "https://" or CommandLine|contains has "ftp://" or CommandLine|contains has "\\\\") and (CommandLine|contains has " -e " or CommandLine|contains has " -en " or CommandLine|contains has " -enc " or CommandLine|contains has " -encoded " or CommandLine|contains has "FromBase64String") and (CommandLine|contains has "%TEMP%" or CommandLine|contains has "%TMP%" or CommandLine|contains has "C:\Users\*\AppData\Local\Temp" or CommandLine|contains has "C:\Windows\Temp")
